title: Gate 4 Telegram receipt collector
objective:
Create file governance/runners/telegram_production_receipt_collector.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import os
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from pathlib import Path

OUT = Path("governance/proofs/external/telegram/production_receipt.json")
REQUIRED_ENV = ["TELEGRAM_RECEIPT_SOURCE", "TELEGRAM_EVIDENCE_REF", "TELEGRAM_COMMIT_SHA"]

def main() -> int:
    missing = [name for name in REQUIRED_ENV if not os.getenv(name)]
    if missing:
        print(json.dumps({"status":"blocked_missing_real_telegram_receipt_input","missing":missing,"release_pass":False}, ensure_ascii=False))
        return 2
    OUT.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    receipt = {"gate":"Gate 4","receipt_type":"telegram_production","source":os.environ["TELEGRAM_RECEIPT_SOURCE"],"captured_at_utc":datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),"status":"real_pass","evidence_ref":os.environ["TELEGRAM_EVIDENCE_REF"],"commit_sha":os.environ["TELEGRAM_COMMIT_SHA"],"release_pass":False}
    OUT.write_text(json.dumps(receipt, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
    print(json.dumps({"status":"receipt_written","path":str(OUT),"release_pass":False}, ensure_ascii=False))
    return 0

if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
Create file tests/governance/test_gate4_telegram_receipt_collector.py with content import subprocess
import sys

def test_gate4_collector_fails_closed_without_real_env():
    result = subprocess.run([sys.executable, "governance/runners/telegram_production_receipt_collector.py"], capture_output=True, text=True)
    assert result.returncode == 2
    assert "blocked_missing_real_telegram_receipt_input" in result.stdout
